metadata.description: Sentinel Scheduled Analytics Rule — RBAC role assignment changes. MITRE Privilege Escalation + Persistence (T1098). Fires on any successful role assignment modification — privilege grants and removals are high-value events worth audit-logging regardless of normality.

properties.description: Detects successful Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments operations. Reviewer must validate the principal and role match approved change-management entries.
properties.query:
AzureActivity
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where OperationNameValue has "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
| where ActivityStatusValue == "Success"
| project TimeGenerated, Caller, OperationNameValue, Properties_d, ResourceId
